swahili.solve_5_chess_notation_challenges: Tatua changamoto 5 za nukuu za chesi
swahili.win_battleship_in_30_shots_or_fewer: Shinda Battleship kwa risasi 30 au chini
swahili.colored_regions_are_the_four_quadrants: 🗺 Maeneo yenye rangi ni robo nne. Badilisha pointi ya mwelekeo hapa chini ili kuona jinsi inavyosogea.
swahili.animate_walk_from_origin_to_this_point: Onyesha mwendo wa njia kutoka asili hadi pointi hii
swahili.why_coordinates_have_two_numbers: 💡 Kwa nini kuratibu zina nambari mbili
swahili.every_point_on_the_plane_has_exactly_t: Kila pointi kwenye uwanda ina nambari mbili haswa.
swahili.the_first_is_the_x_coordinate_how_far_: Ya kwanza ni kuratibu x (umbali wa mlalo kutoka asili: kulia +, kushoto −). Ya pili ni kuratibu y (umbali wa wima: juu +, chini −).
swahili.3_2_is_not_the_same_point_as_2_3_the_f: (3, 2) si pointi sawa na (2, 3). Nambari ya kwanza daima inaunganishwa na x, ya pili daima na y. Njia ya kukumbuka: kwa alfabeti «x huja kwanza».
swahili.four_quadrants_four_sign_combinations: Robo nne = michanganyiko minne ya ishara.
swahili.q_i_both_positive_top_right_q_ii_x_is_: Q I zote chanya (juu kulia). Q II x hasi (juu kushoto). Q III zote hasi (chini kushoto). Q IV y hasi (chini kulia). Nambari za Kirumi huzunguka kinyume cha saa kutoka juu kulia.
swahili.across_the_x_axis_y_flips_across_the_y: Kuvuka mhimili wa x: y inabadilika. Kuvuka mhimili wa y: x inabadilika. Kupitia asili: zote zinabadilika. Ni mabadiliko rahisi zaidi katika jiometri ya kuratibu.
swahili.columns_files_are_letters_a_h_rows_ran: Safu wima ni herufi a-h. Safu mlalo ni nambari 1-8. Kila kisanduku kina kuratibu ya herufi+nambari. Malkia mweupe huanza d1, mfalme mweusi e8.
swahili.type_a_chess_square_like_e4: Andika kisanduku cha chesi kama e4
swahili.practice_mode_translate_squares_to_not: 🎯 Hali ya mazoezi — tafsiri visanduku kwa nukuu
swahili.type_the_chess_notation_for_the_highli: Andika nukuu ya chesi ya kisanduku kilichoangaziwa
swahili.alternates_two_directions_see_the_squa: Hubadilisha mielekeo miwili: ona kisanduku na ukipe jina, sikia jina na ukitafute. 5 mfululizo hushinda beji ya ♟️ Bingwa wa Chesi.
swahili.chess_notation_works_because_it_pairs_: 💡 Nukuu ya chesi hufanya kazi kwa sababu inaunganisha mfumo mmoja wa nambari (herufi kama nafasi) na mwingine (nambari kama nafasi). «Jina» la kisanduku ni kuratibu yake, limeandikwa tu tofauti na (5, 4).
swahili.i_will_hide_4_ships_sizes_4_3_3_2_on_a: Nitaficha meli 4 (ukubwa 4, 3, 3, 2) kwenye gridi ya 10×10. Herufi A-J kwa upana, nambari 1-10 chini. Ita kuratibu kuzitafuta. Meli zote zimezama = umeshinda.
swahili.click_any_cell_to_fire_hit_miss_a_ship: Bofya kisanduku chochote kufyatua. 💥 = umepiga, · = umekosa. Meli huzama wakati visanduku vyake vyote vimepigwa.
swahili.type_a_battleship_coordinate_like_b5_t: Andika kuratibu ya Battleship kama B5, kisha bonyeza Enter kufyatua
swahili.or_tab_through_cells_and_press_enter: au tumia Tab kupita visanduku na ubonyeze Enter
swahili.naval_coordinates_work_the_same_way_as: Kuratibu za jeshi la majini hufanya kazi sawa na kuratibu za hisabati. Herufi + nambari = pointi kwenye gridi.
swahili.latitude_and_longitude_earth_s_coordin: Latitudo na longitudo: mfumo wa kuratibu wa Dunia.
swahili.lat_tells_you_how_far_north_south_of_t: Latitudo hukuambia umbali wa kaskazini/kusini wa ikweta (0° hadi 90°, kaskazini chanya, kusini hasi). Longitudo hukuambia umbali wa mashariki/magharibi wa meridiani kuu (−180° hadi 180°). Kila mahali Duniani pana nambari mbili.
swahili.practice_mode_find_the_place_from_its_: 🎯 Hali ya mazoezi — pata mahali kutoka kuratibu zake
swahili.click_on_the_map_above_within_15_of_th: Bofya ramani iliyo juu. Ndani ya 15° za lengo huhesabiwa sahihi.
swahili.trains_spatial_reasoning_lat_lon_to_a_: Hufundisha hoja za anga: kutoka latitudo/longitudo hadi nafasi kwenye sayari. 5 sahihi hushinda beji ya 🌍 Mwanajiografia wa Dunia.
swahili.every_lat_lon_pair_is_a_coordinate_jus: 💡 Kila jozi ya (latitudo, longitudo) ni kuratibu kama (x, y), kwa kipimo cha sayari tu. Latitudo hasi = kusini, longitudo hasi = magharibi. GPS, ramani za hali ya hewa, urambazaji wa meli — wote wazo moja.
swahili.real_world_coordinate_scenarios: Matukio ya kuratibu ya ulimwengu halisi
swahili.why_these_are_all_coordinate_planes: 💡 Kwa nini hizi zote ni nyuso za kuratibu
swahili.the_file_letter_a_h_is_column_1_8_the_: Herufi ya safu wima a-h ni safu wima 1-8. Nambari ya safu mlalo ni safu mlalo 1-8. e4 = (5, 4) chini.
swahili.identical_structure_to_chess_letter_fo: Muundo sawa na chesi. Herufi kwa safu wima, nambari kwa safu mlalo. B5 = (2, 5).
swahili.latitude_longitude_degrees_north_south: Latitudo + longitudo: digrii za kaskazini/kusini + digrii za mashariki/magharibi.
swahili.same_two_number_pair_idea_scaled_to_a_: Wazo lile lile la jozi ya nambari mbili, lililopanuliwa kwa tufe. Portland, Maine iko (43.66°N, 70.26°W). GPS, hali ya hewa, urambazaji wa meli: zote ni kuratibu.
swahili.every_grid_system_in_the_world_is_a_fi: Kila mfumo wa gridi duniani ni jozi ya (nambari ya kwanza, nambari ya pili). Mara mwanafunzi anapoona kuwa nukuu ya chesi na (x, y) ni kitu kimoja, gridi ya aljebra haionekani tena geni.
swahili.reset_all_points_lines_and_quadrant_to: Weka upya pointi zote, mistari, na ziara ya robo
swahili.fill_in_rise_y_run_x_then_slope_m_rise: Jaza kupanda (Δy), kukimbia (Δx), kisha mteremko (m = kupanda/kukimbia)
swahili.d_x_x_y_y_round_to_1_decimal_place: 💡 d = √((x₂−x₁)² + (y₂−y₁)²)  — Zungusha hadi sehemu 1 ya desimali
swahili.try_2x_1_linear_slope_2_x_3_negative_s: Jaribu: 2x+1 (mstari, mteremko 2), -x+3 (mteremko hasi, y-intercept 3), x^2 (parabola), 0.5x-2 (mteremko wa sehemu). Tumia ^ kwa vipeo.
swahili.sliders_for_x_and_y_widget_tells_you_w: Slaidi za x na y. Wijeti hukuambia uko katika eneo gani tofauti. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo.
swahili.hypothesis_what_sign_combinations_defi: Dhana: Michanganyiko gani ya ishara hufafanua kila robo?
swahili.place_a_point_in_each_quadrant_look_at: Weka pointi katika kila robo. Angalia ishara.
swahili.explain_the_sign_pattern_that_defines_: Eleza mchoro wa ishara unaofafanua kila robo.
swahili.design_note_discrete_7_state_region_ma: Dokezo la muundo: alama ya eneo tofauti yenye hali 7; hakuna alama ya kuratibu; hakuna ufunuo — kwa makusudi.
swahili.c_connect_mode_r_clear_ai_tutor: ⌨️ C: hali ya kuunganisha | R: futa | ?: mkufunzi wa AI

somali.win_battleship_in_30_shots_or_fewer: Ku guulayso Battleship 30 rasaas ama ka yar
somali.identify_5_places_by_coordinates: Aqoonso 5 goobood iyadoo la adeegsanayo isuduwayaasha
somali.colored_regions_are_the_four_quadrants: 🗺 Gobollada midabaysan waa afarta rubuc. Bedel barta diiradda hoose si aad u aragto sida ay u dhaqaaqdo.
somali.animate_walk_from_origin_to_this_point: Muuji socodka wadada laga bilaabo asalka ilaa bartan
somali.why_coordinates_have_two_numbers: 💡 Maxay isuduwayaashu u leeyihiin laba nambar
somali.every_point_on_the_plane_has_exactly_t: Bar kasta oo diyaaradda ku taal waxay leedahay laba nambar oo sax ah.
somali.the_first_is_the_x_coordinate_how_far_: Midka koowaad waa isuduwaha x (intee in le'eg ayuu jiifaa asalka: midig +, bidix −). Midka labaad waa isuduwaha y (intee in le'eg ayuu taagan yahay: kor +, hoos −).
somali.3_2_is_not_the_same_point_as_2_3_the_f: (3, 2) ma aha bar la mid ah (2, 3). Nambarka koowaad had iyo jeer wuxuu la xidhiidhaa x, kan labaad had iyo jeer y. Si aad u xasuusato: alifbeetada «x ayaa marka hore yimaada».
somali.four_quadrants_four_sign_combinations: Afar rubuc = afar isku-dar oo calaamado.
somali.q_i_both_positive_top_right_q_ii_x_is_: Q I labadaba togan (kor midig). Q II x taban (kor bidix). Q III labadaba taban (hoos bidix). Q IV y taban (hoos midig). Tirooyinka Roomaanku waxay wareegaan lidka saacadda laga bilaabo kor midig.
somali.across_the_x_axis_y_flips_across_the_y: Dhex mara dhidibka x: y wuu beddelaa. Dhex mara dhidibka y: x wuu beddelaa. Dhex mara asalka: labadaba way beddelaan. Waa beddelka ugu fudud joomatari isuduwaha.
somali.columns_files_are_letters_a_h_rows_ran: Tiirarku waa xarfaha a-h. Safafku waa tirooyinka 1-8. Sanduuq kasta wuxuu leeyahay isuduwe xaraf+tiro ah. Boqoradda cad waxay ka bilaabantaa d1, boqorka madow e8.
somali.practice_mode_translate_squares_to_not: 🎯 Habka tababarka — u tarjun sanduuqyada calaamado
somali.type_the_chess_notation_for_the_highli: Qor calaamadda chess ee sanduuqa la iftiimiyay
somali.alternates_two_directions_see_the_squa: Wuxuu beddelaa laba jiho: arag sanduuqa oo magacaab, maqal magaca oo hel. 5 isku xiga waxay ku guuleystaan baajka ♟️ Master Chess.
somali.chess_notation_works_because_it_pairs_: 💡 Calaamadaha chess way shaqeeyaan sababtoo ah waxay isku xidhaan nidaam tiro (xarfo sida boos) iyo mid kale (tirooyin sida boos). «Magaca» sanduuqu waa isuduwihiisa, oo kaliya si ka duwan loo qoray (5, 4).
somali.i_will_hide_4_ships_sizes_4_3_3_2_on_a: Waxaan ku qarin doonaa 4 markab (cabbir 4, 3, 3, 2) shabakad 10×10 ah. Xarfaha A-J ballaca, tirooyinka 1-10 hoos. Wac isuduwayaasha si aad u hesho. Dhammaan markabyada way quusteen = waad guulaysatay.
somali.call_coordinates_to_find_the_ships: Wac isuduwayaasha si aad u hesho markabyada.
somali.click_any_cell_to_fire_hit_miss_a_ship: Guji unug kasta si aad u toogato. 💥 = ku dhuftay, · = seegtay. Markabku wuu quustaa marka dhammaan unugyadiisa la garaaco.
somali.type_a_square_to_fire: Qor sanduuq si aad u toogato:
somali.type_a_battleship_coordinate_like_b5_t: Qor isuduwaha Battleship sida B5, ka dibna riix Enter si aad u toogato
somali.or_tab_through_cells_and_press_enter: ama Tab u mar unugyada oo riix Enter
somali.naval_coordinates_work_the_same_way_as: Isuduwayaasha ciidanka badda waxay u shaqeeyaan si la mid ah isuduwayaasha xisaabta. Xaraf + tiro = bar shabakadda ku taal.
somali.latitude_and_longitude_earth_s_coordin: Loolka iyo dhigaha: nidaamka isuduwaha Dhulka.
somali.lat_tells_you_how_far_north_south_of_t: Loolku wuxuu kuu sheegaa intee in le'eg waqooyi/koonfur dhulbaraha (0° ilaa 90°, waqooyi togan, koonfur taban). Dhiguhu wuxuu kuu sheegaa intee in le'eg bari/galbeed meridiyaanka koowaad (−180° ilaa 180°). Goob kasta oo Dhulka jirta waxay leedahay laba nambar.
somali.practice_mode_find_the_place_from_its_: 🎯 Habka tababarka — ka hel goobta isuduwayaasheeda
somali.click_on_the_map_above_within_15_of_th: Guji khariidadda kor. Gudaha 15° ee bartilmaameedka waxaa loo tirinayaa sax.
somali.trains_spatial_reasoning_lat_lon_to_a_: Wuxuu tababaraa fikirka booska: laga bilaabo lool/dhig ilaa boos meeraha ku yaal. 5 sax waxay ku guuleystaan baajka 🌍 Juqraafiga Adduunka.
somali.every_lat_lon_pair_is_a_coordinate_jus: 💡 Lammaane kasta oo (lool, dhig) waa isuduwe sida (x, y), kaliya cabbirka meeraha. Lool taban = koonfur, dhig taban = galbeed. GPS, khariidadaha cimilada, hawl-galka markabka — dhammaan fikrad keliya.
somali.real_world_coordinate_scenarios: Xaaladaha isuduwaha ee adduunka dhabta ah
somali.why_these_are_all_coordinate_planes: 💡 Maxay kuwani dhammaantood u yihiin diyaaradaha isuduwaha
somali.the_file_letter_a_h_is_column_1_8_the_: Xarafka tiirka a-h waa tiirka 1-8. Tirada safka waa safka 1-8. e4 = (5, 4) hoose.
somali.identical_structure_to_chess_letter_fo: Qaab la mid ah chess. Xaraf tiirka, tiro safka. B5 = (2, 5).
somali.latitude_longitude_degrees_north_south: Lool + dhig: digrii waqooyi/koonfur + digrii bari/galbeed.
somali.same_two_number_pair_idea_scaled_to_a_: Fikrad la mid ah ee lammaanaha laba tiro, oo loo cabbiray wareeg. Portland, Maine waxay ku taal (43.66°N, 70.26°W). GPS, cimilo, hawl-galka markabka: dhammaan isuduwayaal.
somali.every_grid_system_in_the_world_is_a_fi: Nidaam kasta oo shabakad adduunka ku jira waa lammaane (tiro koowaad, tiro labaad). Marka uu arday arko in calaamadaha chess iyo (x, y) ay isku mid yihiin, shabakadda aljebrada ma sii muuqato qariib.
somali.reset_all_points_lines_and_quadrant_to: Dib u deji dhammaan barooyinka, xariiqyada, iyo socdaalka rubuca
somali.fill_in_rise_y_run_x_then_slope_m_rise: Buuxi kor (Δy), orod (Δx), ka dibna jaangooyo (m = kor/orod)
somali.function_expression_in_x: Tibaax hawleed oo x ku jirta
somali.try_2x_1_linear_slope_2_x_3_negative_s: Isku day: 2x+1 (toosan, jaangooyo 2), -x+3 (jaangooyo taban, y-intercept 3), x^2 (parabola), 0.5x-2 (jaangooyo jajab). Isticmaal ^ jibbaarka.
somali.sliders_for_x_and_y_widget_tells_you_w: Sliders x iyo y. Widget-ku wuxuu kuu sheegaa gobolka kala duwan ee aad ku jirto. Dhibco ma jiraan, daah-furid ma jirto.
somali.hypothesis_what_sign_combinations_defi: Mala-awaal: Isku-darka calaamadaha kee ayaa qeexaya rubuc kasta?
somali.place_a_point_in_each_quadrant_look_at: Geli bar rubuc kasta. Eeg calaamadaha.
somali.explain_the_sign_pattern_that_defines_: Sharax qaabka calaamadaha ee qeexaya rubuc kasta.
somali.design_note_discrete_7_state_region_ma: Qoraal naqshadeed: calaamad gobol kala duwan oo 7 xaaladood; dhibco isuduwe ma jiraan; daah-furid ma jirto — si ula kac ah.
somali.c_connect_mode_r_clear_ai_tutor: ⌨️ C: habka isku-xirka | R: tirtir | ?: macallinka AI

hausa.plot_points_in_all_4_quadrants: Zana digo a cikin dukkan kwata 4
hausa.win_battleship_in_30_shots_or_fewer: Ka ci Battleship a harbi 30 ko ƙasa
hausa.colored_regions_are_the_four_quadrants: 🗺 Yankunan masu launi su ne kwata huɗu. Canza digon mayar da hankali a ƙasa don ganin yadda yake motsi.
hausa.focus_point_x_y: 📍 Digon mayar da hankali: ( x , y )
hausa.animate_walk_from_origin_to_this_point: Nuna motsin hanya daga tushe zuwa wannan digo
hausa.why_coordinates_have_two_numbers: 💡 Me yasa madaidaita ke da lambobi biyu
hausa.every_point_on_the_plane_has_exactly_t: Kowane digo a kan filin yana da lambobi biyu daidai.
hausa.the_first_is_the_x_coordinate_how_far_: Na farko shi ne madaidaicin x (nisa a kwance daga tushe: dama +, hagu −). Na biyu shi ne madaidaicin y (nisa a tsaye: sama +, ƙasa −).
hausa.3_2_is_not_the_same_point_as_2_3_the_f: (3, 2) ba digo ɗaya ba ne da (2, 3). Lamba ta farko koyaushe tana haɗuwa da x, ta biyu koyaushe da y. Don tunawa: a haruffa «x yana zuwa farko».
hausa.q_i_both_positive_top_right_q_ii_x_is_: Q I dukkan tabbatacce (sama dama). Q II x korau (sama hagu). Q III dukkan korau (ƙasa hagu). Q IV y korau (ƙasa dama). Lambobin Romawa suna juyawa akasin agogo daga sama dama.
hausa.across_the_x_axis_y_flips_across_the_y: Ƙetare gindin x: y yana canzawa. Ƙetare gindin y: x yana canzawa. Ta tushe: duka suna canzawa. Shi ne canjin mafi sauƙi a cikin lissafin madaidaita.
hausa.columns_files_are_letters_a_h_rows_ran: Ginshiƙai haruffa ne a-h. Layuka lambobi ne 1-8. Kowane akwati yana da madaidaicin haruf+lamba. Sarauniya farar tana farawa a d1, sarkin baƙi a e8.
hausa.practice_mode_translate_squares_to_not: 🎯 Yanayin atisaye — fassara akwatuna zuwa alama
hausa.type_the_chess_notation_for_the_highli: Buga alamar dara na akwatin da aka haskaka
hausa.alternates_two_directions_see_the_squa: Yana sauya kwatance biyu: ga akwati ka ba shi suna, ji suna ka neme shi. 5 jere suna samun lambar yabo ta ♟️ Gwanin Dara.
hausa.chess_notation_works_because_it_pairs_: 💡 Alamar dara tana aiki saboda tana haɗa tsarin lamba ɗaya (haruffa kamar wuri) da wani (lambobi kamar wuri). «Sunan» akwati shi ne madaidaicinsa, sai dai an rubuta shi daban da (5, 4).
hausa.i_will_hide_4_ships_sizes_4_3_3_2_on_a: Zan ɓoye jiragen ruwa 4 (girma 4, 3, 3, 2) a kan grid 10×10. Haruffa A-J a faɗi, lambobi 1-10 ƙasa. Kira madaidaita don nemo su. Dukkan jiragen sun nutse = ka ci nasara.
hausa.call_coordinates_to_find_the_ships: Kira madaidaita don nemo jiragen ruwa.
hausa.click_any_cell_to_fire_hit_miss_a_ship: Danna kowane tantanin halitta don harbi. 💥 = ya buga, · = ya kuskura. Jirgin yana nutsewa lokacin da aka buga dukkan tantanansa.
hausa.type_a_battleship_coordinate_like_b5_t: Buga madaidaicin Battleship kamar B5, sannan danna Enter don harbi
hausa.or_tab_through_cells_and_press_enter: ko Tab ta cikin tantani ka danna Enter
hausa.naval_coordinates_work_the_same_way_as: Madaidaitan sojan ruwa suna aiki kamar madaidaitan lissafi. Haruf + lamba = digo a kan grid.
hausa.latitude_and_longitude_earth_s_coordin: Latitude da longitude: tsarin madaidaita na Duniya.
hausa.lat_tells_you_how_far_north_south_of_t: Latitude yana gaya maka nisa arewa/kudu na equator (0° zuwa 90°, arewa tabbatacce, kudu korau). Longitude yana gaya maka nisa gabas/yamma na babban meridian (−180° zuwa 180°). Kowane wuri a Duniya yana da lambobi biyu.
hausa.practice_mode_find_the_place_from_its_: 🎯 Yanayin atisaye — nemo wurin daga madaidaitansa
hausa.click_on_the_map_above_within_15_of_th: Danna taswirar da ke sama. Cikin 15° na manufa ana ƙidaya daidai.
hausa.trains_spatial_reasoning_lat_lon_to_a_: Yana horar da tunani na sarari: daga latitude/longitude zuwa matsayi a duniya. 5 daidai suna samun lambar yabo ta 🌍 Masanin Yanayin Ƙasa na Duniya.
hausa.every_lat_lon_pair_is_a_coordinate_jus: 💡 Kowace ma'aurata (latitude, longitude) madaidaici ne kamar (x, y), sai dai a sikelin duniya. Latitude korau = kudu, longitude korau = yamma. GPS, taswirar yanayi, kewayar jirgin ruwa — duka ra'ayi ɗaya.
hausa.real_world_coordinate_scenarios: Yanayoyin madaidaita na duniya ta gaske
hausa.why_these_are_all_coordinate_planes: 💡 Me yasa waɗannan duka filayen madaidaita ne
hausa.the_file_letter_a_h_is_column_1_8_the_: Harafin ginshiƙi a-h shi ne ginshiƙi 1-8. Lambar layi ita ce layi 1-8. e4 = (5, 4) ƙasa.
hausa.identical_structure_to_chess_letter_fo: Tsari iri ɗaya da dara. Haruf na ginshiƙi, lamba na layi. B5 = (2, 5).
hausa.latitude_longitude_degrees_north_south: Latitude + longitude: digiri arewa/kudu + digiri gabas/yamma.
hausa.same_two_number_pair_idea_scaled_to_a_: Ra'ayi ɗaya na ma'aurata lambobi biyu, an auna shi a kan kwallo. Portland, Maine yana a (43.66°N, 70.26°W). GPS, yanayi, kewayar jirgin ruwa: duka madaidaita.
hausa.every_grid_system_in_the_world_is_a_fi: Kowane tsarin grid a duniya ma'aurata ne (lamba ta farko, lamba ta biyu). Da zarar ɗalibi ya ga cewa alamar dara da (x, y) abu ɗaya ne, grid na algebra ba ya sake jin baƙo.
hausa.reset_all_points_lines_and_quadrant_to: Sake saita dukkan digo, layuka, da yawon kwata
hausa.fill_in_rise_y_run_x_then_slope_m_rise: Cika hawan (Δy), gudu (Δx), sannan gangare (m = hawa/gudu)
hausa.d_x_x_y_y_round_to_1_decimal_place: 💡 d = √((x₂−x₁)² + (y₂−y₁)²)  — Cika zuwa wuri 1 na ƙima
hausa.try_2x_1_linear_slope_2_x_3_negative_s: Gwada: 2x+1 (madaidaiciya, gangare 2), -x+3 (gangare korau, y-intercept 3), x^2 (parabola), 0.5x-2 (gangare juzu'i). Yi amfani da ^ don ƙarfi.
hausa.sliders_for_x_and_y_widget_tells_you_w: Sliders na x da y. Widget yana gaya maka yankin daban da kake ciki. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.hypothesis_what_sign_combinations_defi: Hasashe: Wane haɗin alamomi ke bayyana kowace kwata?
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.place_a_point_in_each_quadrant_look_at: Saka digo a kowace kwata. Duba alamomi.
hausa.what_happens_exactly_on_an_axis: Me ke faruwa daidai a kan gindi?
hausa.explain_the_sign_pattern_that_defines_: Bayyana tsarin alama da ke bayyana kowace kwata.
hausa.design_note_discrete_7_state_region_ma: Bayanin ƙira: alamar yanki daban mai yanayi 7; babu maki na madaidaita; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.
hausa.c_connect_mode_r_clear_ai_tutor: ⌨️ C: yanayin haɗawa | R: share | ?: malamin AI
